name: sidecar
description: /sidecar <args> — thin wrapper over the `sidecar` marketplace CLI (host-local, on PATH via `hx install sidecar`). Verbs — init (scaffold project.tape + CLAUDE.md symlink + LATTICE_POLICY.md) · sync (pull marketplace + refresh cache + installed_plugins.json + enable plugins) · sign (user sign-off gate). `sign <key>` mints a 5-min token at ~/.sidecar/signs/<key>.sign that unlocks agent edits to a sign-gated governance SSOT file — the sign-guard hook hard-denies those edits until a fresh token exists; keys are `commons` (commons.tape) and `project` (project.tape). Bare `sign` / `sign --list` shows active tokens; `sign clear [<key>]` removes them. Args pass through unchanged.
